mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT s.* FROM students s
LEFT JOIN students_courses sc ON s.id = sc.Student_id
AND s.is_deleted = false
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND area = #{area}
AND mail_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{mailAddress}, '%')
AND sc.course LIKE CONCAT('%', #{course}, '%')

SELECT * FROM student WHERE is_deleted = false AND (#{name} IS NULL OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND (#{mailAddress} IS NULL OR mail_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{mailAddress}, '%') AND (#{age} IS NULL OR age = #{age})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students(name, ruby, nickname, mail_address, area, age, gender, remark, is_deleted) VALUES(#{name}, #{ruby}, #{nickname}, #{mailAddress}, #{area}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{remark}, false)
INSERT INTO students_courses(student_id, course, start_date, end_date) VALUES(#{studentId}, #{course}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET name = #{name}, ruby = #{ruby}, nickname = #{nickname}, mail_address = #{mailAddress}, area = #{area}, age = #{age}, gender = #{gender}, remark = #{remark}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE students_courses SET course = #{course} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE course_status SET status = #{status} WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
